items.description: Multi vehicle crash on I-476 northbound between 1.4 miles north of Exit 13: US 30 - ST DAVIDS/VILLANOVA and 1 miles south of Exit 16A: PA 23/I-76 EAST - PHILADELPHIA/CONSHOHOCKEN. There is a lane restriction.
